ChangeRequest.name: Not sufficient definition of financial corporation sectors
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!--See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab)-->
### Overview
Not sufficient definition of financial corporation sectors
### Contact person
@Arjan.Bos , @sdressler
### Description of change request
The institutional sector S.12 - financial corporations includes several types of financial corporations including central banks and credit institutions:
549/2013 - 2.66 Subsectors of financial corporations
The financial corporations sector is subdivided into the following subsectors:
- (a) central bank (S.121); - (b) deposit-taking corporations except the central bank (S.122); - (c) money market funds (MMFs) (S.123); - (d) non-MMF investment funds (S.124); - (e) other financial intermediaries, except insurance corporations and pension funds (S.125); - (f) financial auxiliaries (S.126); - (g) captive financial institutions and money lenders (S.127); - (h) insurance corporations (S.128); and - (i) pension funds (S.129).
The definition is not sufficient to distinguish between central bank, credit institutions and other financial institutions. The split of other financial institutions is required for AnaCredit-reporting.
Change of the reference for definition and split the entity into sub-categories. An overview of the relevant institutional sectors can be found in 549/2012 - 2.31 The institutional Sectors.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
- financial corporations
### Forward Engineering considerations
_\[Other considerations\]_
### Before closing checklist
